name: "💡 Improvement Proposal"
about: Suggest an improvement to existing features or codebase

labels: ["enhancement", "improvement"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Improvement Description
<!-- Please provide a clear and concise description of the improvement you are proposing. -->

## 🧐 Current Behavior (if applicable)
<!-- Describe how the system currently works and why it needs improvement. -->

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
<!-- Explain your proposed solution or how you would like the improvement to be implemented. -->

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or code snippets about the improvement request here. -->

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have checked that a similar issue doesn't already exist.
- [ ] I am willing to work on this improvement and submit a PR.
